2604.19137.title: Construction of Knowledge Graph based on Language Model
2604.19137.paper_summary: Knowledge Graph (KG) can effectively integrate valuable information from massive data, and thus has been rapidly developed and widely used in many fields. Traditional KG construction methods rely on manual annotation, which often consumes a lot of time and manpower. And KG construction schemes based on deep learning tend to have weak generalization capabilities. With the rapid development of Pre-trained Language Models (PLM), PLM has shown great potential in the field of KG construction. This paper provides a comprehensive review of recent research advances in the field of construction of KGs using PLM. In this paper, we explain how PLM can utilize its language understanding and generation capabilities to automatically extract key information for KGs, such as entities and relations, from textual data. In addition, We also propose a new Hyper-Relarional Knowledge Graph construction framework based on lightweight Large Language Model (LLM) named LLHKG and compares it with previous methods. Under our framework, the KG construction capability of lightweight LLM is comparable to GPT3.5.
2604.19137.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜（KG）能有效整合來自海量數據的有價值資訊，因此在許多領域迅速發展並廣泛應用。傳統的KG構建方法依賴手動標註，這往往消耗大量時間和人力。而基於深度學習的KG構建方案則往往具有較弱的泛化能力。隨著預訓練語言模型（PLM）的快速發展，PLM在KG構建領域顯示出巨大的潛力。本文提供了對使用PLM構建KG的最新研究進展的綜合回顧。在本文中，我們解釋了PLM如何利用其語言理解和生成能力，自動從文本數據中提取KG的關鍵信息，例如實體和關係。此外，我們還提出了一個基於輕量級大型語言模型（LLM）的新超關聯知識圖譜構建框架，名為LLHKG，並將其與之前的方法進行比較。在我們的框架下，輕量級LLM的KG構建能力可與GPT3.5相媲美。
2604.19137.author: Qiubai Zhu et.al.
2604.19137.authors: Qiubai Zhu, Qingwang Wang, Haibin Yuan, Wei Chen, Tao Shen
